# Fluent Future Academy

> Fluent Future Academy is a professional language education and integration center based in Massachusetts, United States. Founded by Hanane Benalia, a healthcare language professional with 16 years of experience.

## About
Fluent Future Academy bridges the gap between language learning and real-world professional access. We offer hybrid programs in interpreter training, ESL for professionals, global communication, and foreign languages.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of Fluent Future Academy programs and mission.
- [About](/about): Founder story, mission, and the academy's approach.
- [Programs](/programs): Full catalog of interpreter, ESL, and language programs.
- [Interpreter Training](/programs/interpreter): Community and medical interpreter training.
- [ESL for Professionals](/programs/esl): Beginner, intermediate, and advanced ESL.
- [Global Communication](/programs/communication): Cross-cultural and public speaking programs.
- [Foreign Languages](/programs/languages): Spanish, French, Arabic, and Mandarin.
- [Articles](/articles): Insights on language learning, interpreting, and ESL education.
- [Corporate Training](/corporate): Language and communication programs for organizations.
- [Careers](/teacher-application): Open roles for instructors and staff.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we handle personal data.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms-and-conditions): Terms of service.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Refund and cancellation terms.

## Programs
- 60-hour Community Interpreter Training
- 40-hour Medical Interpreter Fundamentals
- ESL for Professionals: Beginner, Intermediate, and Advanced
- Global Meeting Communication
- Cross-Cultural Intelligence for Professionals
- Public Speaking for Global Audiences
- Spanish, French, Arabic, and Mandarin for Travel & Business

## Contact
- Email: hben@fluentfutureacademy.org

- Phone: 781-985-4558
- Location: Massachusetts, United States

## Membership
- ATA Member — American Translators Association

## Governance
Governed by the laws of the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, United States.
